full.description: All 27 Aery extensions — multi-agent, loop, session memory, and more

pi-skills.description: Official pi-skills — Brave search, browser automation, Gmail, Google Calendar/Drive, transcription, VS Code, YouTube transcripts

interactive-shell.description: Full PTY shell overlay — lets Aery autonomously control interactive CLIs (vim, python REPL, etc). User can take over anytime.

model-switch.description: Lets the agent switch models on its own mid-task

memory.description: Plain-Markdown memory system — persistent notes across sessions

hashline-edit.description: Content-anchored line references for read/grep/edit tools — more token efficient

rtk.description: Routes bash commands through rtk for LLM token savings

oh-aery.description: One-click setup — extensions, themes, prompts, skills, and ant-colony swarm. Like oh-my-zsh for Aery.

geospatial.description: Geospatial tools — GDAL, coordinate systems, GIS workflows

data-science.description: Data science tools — Jupyter, pandas, numpy helpers
